description: Fix all critical errors and warnings found in the TEST_REPORT.md. The main issues to fix are: (1) Missing PWA icon files (icon-192.png and icon-512.png) in frontend/public/icons/, (2) Any other issues found in the test report. Then update TEST_REPORT.md to mark fixed items, and update the PRD (PRD_RentalManagement_SaaS.md) to reflect the current state including Google OAuth, organization setup/rename, new endpoints, and new pages.
steps: Read TEST_REPORT.md to identify all critical errors and warnings
Fix missing PWA icons: generate placeholder SVG-based PNG icons (192x192 and 512x512) at frontend/public/icons/icon-192.png and frontend/public/icons/icon-512.png
Fix any other critical errors or warnings listed in the report
Update TEST_REPORT.md to mark each fixed item with [x] and add a note about the fix
Update PRD_RentalManagement_SaaS.md Section 10.1 (Authentication) to add Google OAuth sign-in/sign-up flow with POST /api/v1/auth/google endpoint
Update PRD Section 10.1 to add the organization rename/setup flow after Google signup
Add /organization-setup onboarding page to the relevant UI sections in the PRD
Add PATCH /api/v1/organizations and GET /api/v1/organizations/me endpoints to the PRD
Add OrganizationSetupPage and OrganizationSettingsPage to the UI screens list in the PRD
Update any other PRD sections that no longer match the actual implementation
Run npm run build again in frontend/ to verify all fixes pass
acceptance_criteria: All critical errors from TEST_REPORT.md are fixed
All warnings from TEST_REPORT.md are fixed or acknowledged
TEST_REPORT.md is updated with [x] marks on fixed items
PRD_RentalManagement_SaaS.md Section 10.1 includes Google OAuth flow
PRD includes organization setup/rename endpoints and pages
npm run build succeeds in frontend/ after all fixes
python3 -c 'from app.main import app' succeeds in backend/ after all fixes
verification: Run npm run build in frontend/ directory and confirm success
Run python3 -c 'from app.main import app' in backend/ directory and confirm success
Verify PRD_RentalManagement_SaaS.md contains 'Google OAuth' or 'google' references in Section 10.1
findings: All fixes applied successfully. PWA icons generated with Pillow. Code splitting reduced initial bundle from 1,272 KB single chunk to split chunks (largest initial chunk: 287 KB). npm audit acknowledged as dev-only. PRD updated with Google OAuth flow (Section 10.1) and Organization Management (Section 10.6). Both frontend build (npm run build) and backend import check pass.
